case_title: ABEL GALVEZ VS. RANGEL ABEL DOMINGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, RANGEL ABEL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALVEZ, ABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, RANGEL ABEL $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY GALVEZ, ABEL AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, RANGEL ABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
